nameMeanings.name: Cressett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Derry): perhaps from Gaelic crosaid ‘little cross’. If so, it is likely to be a variant of Crossan . Compare the pair Corbett and Corban .

variants.name: Crossan
meanings: Irish (Donegal): shortened form of McCrossen , an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Chrosáin ‘son of the satirist’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cressett was born about 1442, in Upton Cressett, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Cressett, was 24 and his mother, Christian Stapleton, was 21. He married Jane Corbet about 1455. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 12 April 1524, in his hometown.

Il a épousé Jane Corbet environ 1455. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 12 avril 1524, dans sa ville natale.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cressett(이)가 대략 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 업턴 크레싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Cressett(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Stapleton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1455년 Jane Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1524년 4월 12일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.
